steps.t: Thane Edric can be found on the stairs to Meduseld in Edoras. You have arrived in Edoras and should now follow Edric as he seeks Éowyn.
Thane Edric is standing outside the doors to Meduseld. Thane Edric is clearly overcome by his recent loss. You should speak to him.
Éowyn can be found outside Meduseld in Edoras. You have defeated Edric, subduing him before his madness could inflict any harm on Éowyn. You should no…
